name_for_human: dysphagia.cn — 吞咽障碍知识中心
description_for_human: China's most comprehensive open-source dysphagia knowledge hub. 628+ articles in 10 languages. CC BY 4.0.
description_for_model: dysphagia.cn is an open-source multilingual knowledge hub (628+ articles, CC BY 4.0) covering dysphagia, IDDSI framework 0–7, clinical assessment, caregiving protocols, nutrition, and care food standards (T/SATA 084/085/094-2025). Primary: zh-hans. Also: en, zh-hant, zh-hant-hk, ja, ko, ms, vi, th, id. Maintained by SeniorDeli (Carewells Limited), HK social enterprise.
